objective: Close all open bugs and uncommitted work. Complete BACK-002 and BACK-007. Arrive Monday with a clean, smoke-tested system ready to trade and ready to activate BACK-001.

commits.message: feat(core): 4-agent pipeline + IC short gate fix + finnhub + portfolio manager + correlation tool
commits.description: Committed 8 files that were in-flight but uncommitted. Key fix: get_short_quality_score() was imported by signal_pipeline.py and risk.py but missing from ic_calculator.py (ImportError on any short candidate). Added the function with correct Phase 1 behavior (returns 0.0 when < 20 short records, inverts forward-return sign for shorts). Also committed finnhub_client.py, portfolio_manager.py, tools/signal_correlation.py, and the 4-agent pipeline redesign in agents.py.

commits.message: feat(learning/skew/risk): BACK-002 direction tracking + BACK-007 directional skew display
commits.description: BACK-002: Added direction field to log_signal_scan() records so short IC can be tracked separately once 20+ short trades accumulate. BACK-007: Wired get_directional_skew_multi() into bot_trading.py scan loop and initialized dash['skew'] in bot_state.py — the dashboard skew bar was already built but never populated. Risk.py type annotation fixes for Python 3.9 compat.

commits.message: fix(tests): patch _get_edge_gate_adj in threshold test to avoid data-state dependency
commits.description: test_raised_threshold_filters_below was reading the real data/ic_weights.json (IC=0.01, degraded) which triggered the edge gate (+5) and caused a wrong expected count. Patched the function directly for deterministic tests.

deliverables.description: Added get_short_quality_score(). Filters signals_log to direction='SHORT' records, computes mean positive Spearman IC across dimensions with inverted forward returns (price drop = win for shorts). Returns 0.0 when < 20 short records (correct Phase 1 behavior). Was causing ImportError crash on any short candidate.

Added direction field to log_signal_scan() records. Enables future short IC computation by ic_calculator once 20+ short trades accumulate. Previously the IC audit records had no direction — get_short_quality_score() would have always returned 0.0 even with many short trades.
Added dash['skew'] = {} initialization. The dashboard already had skew bar UI (skew-bar, skew-val, skew-detail, skew-alert elements) but the data key was never initialized or populated.

Wire get_directional_skew_multi() call into scan loop (runs each scan, after pipeline). Populates dash['skew'] with {48h, 7d} windows so the dashboard skew bar now works. Also confirmed portfolio_manager.py was already fully wired (lines 48-1043) — no further wiring needed.
4-agent deterministic pipeline: Technical Analyst + Trading Analyst (Opus, 1 call) + Risk Manager + Final Decision. Replaces old 6-agent serial chain. 1 LLM call per scan.
Thin Finnhub REST wrapper (free tier). Rate limited to 55/min. Endpoints: /quote and /company-news. Used as Tier 2b fallback in news.py.

Thesis drift detection via Opus. Event-triggered (pre_market, regime_change, score_collapse, news_hit, earnings_risk, cascade, drawdown). Actions: HOLD/TRIM/EXIT/ADD. Already wired into bot_trading.py.
Read-only Pearson correlation + PCA analysis tool for signals_log.jsonl. CLI: python3 tools/signal_correlation.py --threshold 0.6. Diagnoses redundant dimensions and effective signal count.

discovery.portfolio_manager_already_wired: portfolio_manager.py was listed as P2 (wire into agents.py) but was already fully imported and wired in bot_trading.py lines 48-1043 with all 7 trigger types implemented. No additional wiring needed.
discovery.back002_mostly_done: BACK-002 short scanner had its TV scan components (scans 4-8: breakdown, volume_distribution, bearish_momentum, intraday_breakdown, gap_down) already in scanner.py, and the short quality gate already wired in signal_pipeline.py. The only missing piece was direction not being recorded in IC audit records — fixed in learning.py.
discovery.back007_mostly_done: BACK-007 directional skew had get_directional_skew() and get_directional_skew_multi() already implemented in learning.py, and the dashboard UI already had the skew bar. Only the wiring (bot_state init + bot_trading.py call) was missing.
discovery.test_gap: test_raised_threshold_filters_below was reading real data/ic_weights.json from disk, making it sensitive to system state. Fixed with targeted mock patch.

monday_readiness.observation_window: feat-alpha-pipeline-v2 activated 2026-04-01. Window expires 2026-04-08 (Monday). Next sizing activation allowed then.
monday_readiness.back001_status: BACK-001 (direction-agnostic signal engine, ~4 days) not in SIZING_AFFECTING_FEATURES — can start any time. Recommended for Monday morning after reviewing the spec.
monday_readiness.system_health: 148 tests passing, 0 failures. Short gate live (returns 0.0 = unproven, correctly blocks shorts below score 28). Skew dashboard now live. All previously uncommitted files committed.
open_items: data/ic_weights.json, data/hwm_state.json, data/alpha_decay_cache.json are unstaged runtime state — do not commit
VIX double-counting (Kelly + regime router) — documented, will resolve in feat-ic-weighted-scoring Phase 3
Short IC learning active from now: direction field logged, will accumulate data for future get_short_quality_score() improvement

next_steps: Monday 2026-04-08: run system dry-scan before market open
Monday 2026-04-08: observe window expires — can activate BACK-001 (direction-agnostic signal engine)
Review BACK-001 spec before starting implementation
Continue accumulating agent-scored trades toward Phase 2 IC gate (200 trades target)
